question: Is the foreground bottom a stretch of light-colored fine sandy beach?
Are there approximately seven or eight seashells scattered on the sand surface?
Do the scattered seashells include white scallop shells, pink spiral conch shells, and grey clam shells?
Are there two pairs of flip-flops (one blue, one red) located in the lower left corner?
Is there a rolled-up yellow and white striped beach towel near the flip-flops?
Is there an open woven straw tote bag revealing sunscreen, black sunglasses, and a blue-covered magazine?
Is there a green plastic sand shovel half-inserted in the sand next to an overturned yellow sand bucket?
Is a young woman reclining on the left side wearing a white wide-brimmed sun hat and an emerald green bikini?
Is the woman reclining on an orange striped folding lounge chair?
Is the woman holding a pink cocktail with a yellow mini umbrella?
Is a man in black swim trunks lying face down on a blue and white striped lounge chair beside the woman?
Are white sunscreen smear marks visible on the man's back?
Is a dark-skinned boy in red beach shorts half-kneeling on the right side of the foreground?
Is the boy using a blue small shovel to build a sand castle?
Is the sand castle three-tiered?
Is the sand castle topped with a white paper flag?
Is a little girl in a pink swimsuit beside the boy pressing shell decorations into the castle walls?
Is the middle ground emerald-colored shallow seawater with waves churning white foam?
Are there approximately six or seven people visible in the water?
Is there a freestyle swimmer wearing a red swim cap?
Are there two teenagers splashing water at each other playfully?
Is there a tall man carrying a white surfboard walking toward deeper water?
Are there two people in orange life vests paddling the kayak?
Are there two rainbow-colored inflatable rings floating on the sea surface?
Is there a blue inflatable dolphin pool toy floating on the sea surface?
Is there a white double-masted sailboat in the distant background?
Is the number '52' printed in red on the sailboat's sail?
Is there a silhouette of a small island with tropical green vegetation at the horizon line?
Is the sky pure azure blue with a few wisps of white cirrus clouds?
Is there a flock of about six or seven white seagulls soaring in the upper left corner?
Are the human figures (faces, hands, limbs) free from severe distortions or deformities?
Is the image free from severe rendering artifacts (e.g., smeared textures, impossible object geometries)?
Do objects obey physical gravity (e.g., kayak on water, not floating in sky)?
